title: PR Context
description: PR business context for code-argus code review, providing Jira integration and additional context for review agents

prTitle.description: Pull request title (often contains Jira issue key)

examples: This PR fixes the login validation issue reported in PROJ-123

jiraIssues.description: Array of Jira issues associated with this PR (can be empty if no Jira integration)

parseStatus.description: Status of Jira key parsing: 'found' = issues found and fetched, 'none' = no Jira keys in title, 'partial_error' = some issues failed to fetch

parseMessage.description: Optional status message for debugging (e.g., 'Successfully processed 2 Jira issues')

JiraIssueSummary.description: Summary of a Jira issue extracted for code review context

summary.description: Concise summary of the issue (100-200 characters recommended)
examples: Login fails when password contains special characters like & or <

keyPoints.description: Key acceptance criteria or fix points extracted from the issue
examples: Handle special characters in password input
Show proper error message for invalid characters
Add input validation on both client and server

reviewContext.description: Context relevant to code review - what reviewers should focus on
examples: Check input validation and sanitization for XSS prevention
Verify error handling covers edge cases mentioned in acceptance criteria

examples.prDescription: This PR fixes the login validation issue where special characters in passwords were causing failures.

jiraIssues.summary: Login fails when password contains special characters
keyPoints: Handle special characters in password input
Show proper error message for invalid input
jiraIssues.reviewContext: Check input validation and encoding for special characters

examples.parseMessage: No Jira keys found in PR title
